notes: Cross-cutting negative-vector pack: inputs that are well-formed CBOR per §3 but violate the canonical-encoding rules of §4.2.1 and must therefore be rejected with ANTS_ERROR_NON_CANONICAL by the deterministic decoder.

negative_vectors.name: uint 0 in 2-byte form (non-shortest)
negative_vectors.rule: shortest-form integer; value 0 must use the 1-byte form 0x00

negative_vectors.name: uint 23 in 3-byte form (non-shortest)
negative_vectors.rule: shortest-form integer; value 23 must use the 1-byte form 0x17

negative_vectors.name: uint 255 in 5-byte form (non-shortest)
negative_vectors.rule: shortest-form integer; value 255 must use the 2-byte form 0x18 0xff

negative_vectors.name: uint 2^32-1 in 9-byte form (non-shortest)
negative_vectors.rule: shortest-form integer; value 2^32-1 fits in the 5-byte form

negative_vectors.name: reserved additional-info 28
negative_vectors.rule: additional-info 28 is reserved by RFC 8949 and rejected under §4.2.1

negative_vectors.name: indefinite-length item (major 0, info 31)
negative_vectors.rule: indefinite-length items are forbidden by §4.2.1; the additional-info value 31 is rejected regardless of major type
